allow: PowerShell($job = Get-ChildItem E:\\nwchem\\jobs -Directory | Select-Object -First 1; Copy-Item "C:\\Users\\czent\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\E--nwchem\\5a26574d-dc42-4710-a502-d8e1938888f1\\scratchpad\\sample.out" "$\($job.FullName\)\\output.out"; $meta = Get-Content "$\($job.FullName\)\\meta.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $meta.status = "done"; $meta | ConvertTo-Json | Out-File "$\($job.FullName\)\\meta.json" -Encoding utf8; $job.Name)

PowerShell($env:APP_PASSWORD = "testpw123"; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden python -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","app.server:app","--port","8399" -WorkingDirectory "E:\\nwchem" -PassThru | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 3; $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8399/api/status" -UseBasicParsing; "status\(open\): $\($r1.StatusCode\) auth=$\(\(\($r1.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).auth\)\)"; try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8399/api/jobs" -UseBasicParsing } catch { "jobs\(no cookie\): $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8399/api/login" -Method POST -Body '{"password":"wrong"}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing } catch { "login\(wrong\): $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; $s = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8399/api/login" -Method POST -Body '{"password":"testpw123"}' -ContentType "application/json" -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing; "login\(right\): $\($r2.StatusCode\)"; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8399/api/jobs" -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing; "jobs\(cookie\): $\($r3.StatusCode\)")
